/usr/bin/c++ -g -rdynamic CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatserver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatservice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/db/connectionpool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/db/db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/redis/redis.cpp.o -o /home/lth/chat_server/ChatServer/bin/ChatServer   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_highgui.so.4.6.0 -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lmysqlclient -lhiredis -lpthread -lssl -lcrypto /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_videoio.so.4.6.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.6.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.6.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.4.6.0
